rationale: Active war continues at maximum background level; US attention on Iran deal negotiations remains a concern for sustained Western support to Ukraine.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war: active combat continues
top_events.summary: War continues with daily strikes and frontline activity directly threatening Ukrainian lives and infrastructure — no qualitative change but remains the defining reality.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump claims Sunday signing, Tehran disputes
top_events.summary: US diplomatic focus on Iran risks diverting political attention and resources away from Ukraine aid at a critical moment in the war.

top_events.title: UK seizes Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: UK enforcement against Russia's shadow fleet tightens sanctions pressure on Moscow, a modest positive signal for Ukraine's war effort.
